name: replaceStickerInSet
description: Use this method to replace an existing sticker in a sticker set with a new one. The method is equivalent to calling deleteStickerFromSet, then addStickerToSet, then setStickerPositionInSet

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User identifier of the sticker set owner

parameters.name: old_sticker
parameters.description: File identifier of the replaced sticker

parameters.name: sticker
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object with information about the added sticker. If exactly the same sticker had already been added to the set, then the set remains unchanged.
